workflow.name: Create and Paint a Landscape Terrain
workflow.description: Create a landscape actor, import or sculpt a heightmap, assign a landscape material with multiple layers, and configure auto-painting rules.
intentPatterns: landscape with grass and rock layers

steps.purpose: Create a new Landscape actor with specified dimensions
Import a heightmap for terrain shape
Create a landscape material with layer blend node
Assign grass texture to first layer
Assign rock texture to second layer
Assign dirt/path texture to third layer
Assign the landscape material to the terrain
Verify landscape setup and material assignment

workflow.expectedOutcome: A landscape terrain with multi-layer material ready for painting with grass, rock, and dirt surfaces
